data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Go Sideways But This Trader Says You 'Shouldn't Long' One Of Them
data.description: Cryptocurrency markets are trading sideways on Monday amid ongoing tariff uncertainty.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Cuts Outlook For These Hotel And Lodging Stocks As Potential Recession Looms
data.description: Goldman Sachs analyst Lizzie Dove downgrades U.S. Lodging C-Corps and Timeshares due to weaker consumer demand, geopolitical uncertainty, and negative impacts from U.S. airlines. The forecast for 2025 RevPAR is lowered by 125 basis points, with a 45% probability of a U.S. recession. Preference shifts towards asset-light companies with global exposure, focusing on non-RevPAR and ancillary revenues amid uncertain macro conditions.

data.title: These Gaming Stocks Are Under Pressure As Analyst Cuts Forecast On Macau Risk And Soft Vegas Data
data.description: BofA Securities analyst expects cautious tone from gaming operators due to US/China tensions and lowered estimates for Macau and Vegas. Stocks down 12% YTD.

data.title: 'No Expiration Date' On Meta's Antitrust Case, Says Former FTC Chair As Trial Begins
data.description: An antitrust lawsuit against Meta Platforms could see the company forced to divest or spinoff Instagram and/or WhatsApp.

data.title: What's Going On With Sonder Shares Today: What's Going On?
data.description: Sonder Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SOND) are trading higher Monday after the company announced a set of financial and strategic actions aimed at improving its balance sheet and operational efficiency.
